'''babozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jnana|jnana]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-b-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jnana|jnana]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| babozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bæbezeth|bæbezeth]] || [[word:bæbezej|bæbezej]] || [[word:bæbezesh|bæbezesh]] || [[word:bæbeze|bæbeze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:babobozoth|babobozoth]] || [[word:babobozoj|babobozoj]] || [[word:babobozosh|babobozosh]] || [[word:babobozo|babobozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:babozoth|babozoth]] || [[word:babozoj|babozoj]] || [[word:babozosh|babozosh]] || [[word:babozo|babozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:babofzofth|babofzofth]] || [[word:babofzofj|babofzofj]] || [[word:babofzofsh|babofzofsh]] || [[word:babofzof|babofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:babozotho|babozotho]] || [[word:babozojo|babozojo]] || [[word:babozosho|babozosho]] || [[word:babozoko|babozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:babozoth|babozoth]] || [[word:babozoj|babozoj]] || [[word:babozosh|babozosh]] || [[word:babozo|babozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:babozothol|babozothol]] || [[word:babozojol|babozojol]] || [[word:babozoshol|babozoshol]] || [[word:babozokol|babozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:babozoothotho|babozoothotho]] || [[word:babozoojojo|babozoojojo]] || [[word:babozooshosho|babozooshosho]] || [[word:babozooko|babozooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:babozothon|babozothon]] || [[word:babozojon|babozojon]] || [[word:babozoshon|babozoshon]] || [[word:babozokon|babozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:babozothooro|babozothooro]] || [[word:babozojooro|babozojooro]] || [[word:babozoshooro|babozoshooro]] || [[word:babozokooro|babozokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|307a66b}}
